en: Because when you were directing yourself, Seth, how hard was it, as an actor, not to do voices?
ko: 시간 내주셔서 감사합니다. 라이언, 당신부터 시작할게요. 처음 블레이드 러너를 봤을 때 어떤 느낌이었나요?

en: Because that is kind of your life.
Yeah, I mean, it was less of a leap
than I feared it would be.
You know, doing Family Guy, I had gotten into the habit
ko: 패밀리 가이를 하면서 대사를 녹음하고 부스에 들어가 듣는 습관이 있었는데

en: of being able to record a line and then go into the booth and listen to it and switch off my brain
ko: 뇌를 꺼버리고 다른 사람이 말하는 것처럼 들을 수 있었어요.

en: and kind of feel like I'm listening to somebody else.
ko: 촬영 과정에서도 꽤 일찍 그 감각이 작동했어요.

en: And that did kick in pretty early on into the process,
where I was able to run into Video Village
ko: 영상을 보고 제대로 하고 있는지 확인할 수 있었어요.

en: and look at the footage and see if I was doing it right.
ko: 몇 가지 목소리를 하세요? 인터뷰를 가로채는 건 아닌데,

en: How many voices do you do? Sorry, I don't mean to take over your interview,
ko: 그냥 궁금해서요, 몇 개나 할 수 있어요?

en: but I'm just kind of curious, like how many can you do?
You know, just enough to avoid being myself.
So in Family Guy, the characters you do,
you do Peter, Brian, Stewie, Quagmire,
and then a smattering of others, as needed. Are they all?
ko: 그리고 필요한 만큼 다른 것들도 조금씩. 다 있는 건가?
